title: Indika Energi’s subsidiary to establish new subsidiary, investing IDR 6.25 billion
body: PT Indika Energi Tbk (INDY), through two of its subsidiaries, PT Kalista Soter Hastia (KSH) and PT Kalista Nusa Armada (KNA), will form a new subsidiary with total investment worth IDR 6.25 billion.

title: Wira Global Solusi’s net profit got corrected 33.8% in H1 2024
body: PT Wira Global Solusi Tbk (WIRG), an IT solution provider for small-medium enterprises, booked net profit of IDR 1.96 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Iforte secures loan of JPY 14 billion
body: A subsidiary of PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk (TOWR) obtains a credit facility worth JPY 14 billion from PT Bank Mizuho Indonesia.

title: ISAT plans a stock split of 1:4 ratio
body: PT Indosat Tbk (ISAT) will split the stock value (stock split) with a ratio of 1:4, meaning that one old share will be split into 4 new shares with updated value.

title: Shifting to green zone, net foreign volume closed at 354.80 million shares
body: On Wednesday, August 7, foreign investors increased their share purchases, totaling 1.97 billion shares. The foreign selling volume was 1.62 billion shares, bringing the net foreign volume into the green zone and closing at 354.80 million shares. The share purchase transactions then began with the purchase of 141.66 million shares of the energy resources infrastructure company PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI), with a net volume of 115.92 million shares.

title: Indika Energi’s subsidiary to establish new subsidiary, investing IDR 6.25 billion
body: PT Indika Energi Tbk (INDY), through two of its subsidiaries, PT Kalista Soter Hastia (KSH) and PT Kalista Nusa Armada (KNA), will form a new subsidiary with total investment worth IDR 6.25 billion.

title: Wira Global Solusi’s net profit got corrected 33.8% in H1 2024
body: PT Wira Global Solusi Tbk (WIRG), an IT solution provider for small-medium enterprises, booked net profit of IDR 1.96 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Iforte secures loan of JPY 14 billion
body: A subsidiary of PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk (TOWR) obtains a credit facility worth JPY 14 billion from PT Bank Mizuho Indonesia.

title: ISAT plans a stock split of 1:4 ratio
body: PT Indosat Tbk (ISAT) will split the stock value (stock split) with a ratio of 1:4, meaning that one old share will be split into 4 new shares with updated value.

title: Shifting to green zone, net foreign volume closed at 354.80 million shares
body: On Wednesday, August 7, foreign investors increased their share purchases, totaling 1.97 billion shares. The foreign selling volume was 1.62 billion shares, bringing the net foreign volume into the green zone and closing at 354.80 million shares. The share purchase transactions then began with the purchase of 141.66 million shares of the energy resources infrastructure company PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI), with a net volume of 115.92 million shares.

title: Pegadaian to issue Sukuk Mudharabah of IDR 2.22 trillion
body: PT Pegadaian (Persero), a state-owned company engaged in pawn-brokerage, will issue 2 Sukuk Mudharabah with total principal of IDR 2.22 trillion.

title: Citi Indonesia: Low domestic consumption calls for structural reform, starting from services sector boost
body: Amidst the streak of domestic consumption decline, Helmi Arman, Chief Economist of Citi Indonesia, believes that one of the keys to correct the issue lies on balanced growth of economic sector, giving more emphasis on labour-intensive sector, such as services sector.

title: PZZA recorded loss again, hitting IDR 75.11 billion in H1 2024
body: PT Sarimelati Kencana Tbk (PZZA), the license holder of Pizza Hut in Indonesia, reported another loss of IDR 75.11 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Financial performance improves, Moody’s to revise APLN’s rating
body: Moody’s Rating has reportedly promoted Corporate Family Rating (CFR) of PT Agung Podomoro Land Tbk (APLN) to Caa1 from the previous Caa3 starting from August 8, 2024.

title: DOID quietly collects 5.07% of Australia-based 29Metals
body: PT Bukit Makmur Mandiri Utama (BUMA), one of subsidiaries of PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID), has acquired 36.51 million shares or 5.07% of 29Metals, a copper and precious metal mining company based in Australia.

title: Mayapada Hospital eyes IDR 2.74 trillion in upcoming private placement next year
body: PT Sejahteraraya Anugrahjaya Tbk (SRAJ), the operator of Mayapada Hospital, is aiming to raise IDR 2.74 trillion via a private placement next year.

title: Xolare RCR Energy secures hauling road extension contract worth IDR 49 billion
body: PT Xolare RCR Energi Tbk (SOLA), an asphalt manufacturer and distributor, has signed a contract of an extension of hauling road for coal phase 1, spanning 5 km in South Sumatra.

title: DSSA to acquire data centre for IDR 26.5 billion
body: PT Dian Swastatika Sentosa Tbk (DSSA), a mining company under Sinarmas Group, has reportedly acquired PT Teknovatus Solusi Sejahtera (TSS) for IDR 26.5 billion.

title: BI assessment on national economic growth in line with IMF projection
body: Bank Indonesia (BI) mentions that the assessment of Indonesia’s economic growth aligns with the projection made by International Monetary Fund (IMF) at 5% in 2024 and 5.1% in 2025.

title: MSIUS 2024 promotes modern waqf practices and Islamic collaboration in investments
body: Aiming to drive collaborative adoption of Islamic financial principles in digital innovations and current global challenges, Menara Syariah and INCEIF University presents a two-day event of the 1st Menara Syariah & INCEIF University Symposium (MSIUS) 2024 from August 8 to 9, 2024.

title: Consumption ratio down, loan instalment rates up
body: The ratio of loan instalment of Indonesians reportedly increased in July 2024, as seen on Consumer Survey of Bank Indonesia (BI) published today (8/8).

title: SCMA’s net profit skyrocketed, supported by 9.9% revenue growth
body: PT Surya Citra Media Tbk (SCMA), the media company managing SCTV and Indosiar television channels, reported net profit of IDR 327.7 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: First half results are in, BNII saw 2.60% decline in revenue
body: The revenue of PT Bank Maybank Indonesia Tbk (BNII) slowed down, triggering a decline of its net profit in H1 2024 compared to H1 2023.

title: BNBR releases 2.23% VKTR shares to pay debts
body: PT Bakrie & Brothers Tbk (BNBR), a multi-sector holding issuer belonging to the Bakrie Group, has released 2.23% of its shares in PT VKTR Teknologi Mobilitas Tbk (VKTR).

title: Offering 7 series, Govt aims for IDR 8 trillion in state sukuk auction next week
body: The Indonesian government will hold another auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or government sukuk on August 13 2024, with an indicative target of IDR 8 trillion.

title: JAYA distributes interim dividends of IDR 4 billion
body: PT Armada Berjaya Trans Tbk (JAYA) allocated an interim dividend of IDR 4 billion or IDR 4 per share for the 2024 financial year.

title: Citigroup: US in early phase of recession, opportunity for BI-rate cut
body: Chief Economist of Citi Indonesia, Hemi Arman, revealed that the US economy is probably heading towards recession.

title: A year after IPO, HBAT’s stock crashes 332%
body: The stock performance of PT Minahasa Membangun Hebat Tbk (HBAT) dropped 332% after a year debuting on the stock exchange, since August 7, 2023.

title: PLN net profit plunges 80.7% driven by soaring operating expenses
body: Perusahaan Listrik Negara (Persero) or PLN, posted a net profit of IDR 4.99 trillion in the first semester (1H) 2024, down 80.7% year-on-year (yoy) or from the same period last year.

title: Topindoku aims 30% profit growth this year
body: PT Topindo Solusi Komunika Tbk (TOSK) is targeting 30% net profit growth at the end of this year. In 2023, the company reported net profit of IDR 5.4 billion.

title: WINS provides US$10 million guarantee for subsidiary
body: PT Wintermar Offshore Marine Tbk (WINS), a transportation services issuer, has provided a corporate guarantee of US$10 million.

title: JLL Indonesia: Prospect for Indonesian data centers are still good
body: JLL Indonesia, a commercial real estate management company, views data centers as a property segment that has bright prospects in Indonesia in years to come.

title: Organon Pharma now holds longest suspension status on IDX
body: At least 53 issuers are waiting in line for delisting from the share registration board at the Indonesian Stock Exchange (BEI). One of them, namely, PT Organon Pharma Indonesia Tbk (SCPI) has been in suspended status for the past 10 years.

title: Recently debuting, DOSS ambitiously plan expansion of 2-3 outlets this year
body: PT Global Sukses Digital Tbk (DOSS) reveals its expansion plan after recently securing its spot as an issuer listed on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) through its initial public offering (IPO) on Wednesday, August 7, 2024.

title: KB Valbury Sekuritas invests 3.23 billion shares in Astrindo Nusantara (BIPI)
body: On Monday, August 5, PT KB Valbury Sekuritas made a new equity investment in PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI), a company that provides integrated energy infrastructure. This investor purchased 3.23 billion BIPI shares in total, giving them a 5.07% ownership stake. Furthermore, PT KB Valbury Sekuritas has acquired up to 250 million shares of the oil and gas tanker company PT Buana Lintas Lautan Tbk (BULL), resulting in an increase in their share portion from 5.74% to 7.51%.

title: Foreign share volumes show small gap, net foreign volume closed at -198.17 million shares
body: Foreign investors' share buying and selling activity on Tuesday, August 6, had a small gap. Foreign buying volume was 1.91 billion shares, and foreign selling volume was 2.11 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume ended at -198.17 million shares. The energy resources infrastructure company PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) purchased the most shares, totaling around 166.48 million shares, with a net volume of 163.46 million shares.

title: AUTO scored profit of IDR 1.01 trillion
body: PT Astra Otoparts Tbk (AUTO) bagged net profit of IDR 1.01 trillion in the first half of 2024, up 26.46% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 801.55 billion seen in H1 2023.

title: BYAN to allocate IDR 306.16 billion for coal distribution
body: PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN), the biggest coal mining company in Indonesia, spends IDR 306.16 billion on the improvement of hauling road for coal logistics for one of its subsidiaries, PT Fajar Sakti Prima (FSP).

title: MPXL secures credit of IDR 41.48 billion
body: PT MPX Logistics International Tbk (MPXL) obtained investment credit facility worth IDR 41.48 billion from PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA).

title: Despite sluggish sales, BIKE's net profit grew 18.8% in first half
body: PT Sepeda Bersama Indonesia Tbk (BIKE), a bicycle distributor that holds the Genio Bike and United Bike brands, posted a net profit of IDR 4.67 billion in the first semester (1H) 2024.

title: MARK to pay out interim dividend of IDR 76 billion
body: PT Mark Dynamics Indonesia Tbk (MARK) will distribute an interim dividend of IDR 76 billion or IDR 20 per share for the 2024 fiscal year period.

title: Long list of companies on the verge of delisting, IDX pushes for buyback
body: The authority of Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) advises companies on the verge of delisting to arrange a shares buyback as a means of investor protection.

title: SUN auction reported incoming bids of IDR 66.99 trillion
body: Total incoming bids reported in the last round of Government Securities (SUN) auction hit IDR 66.99 trillion, according to DJPPR of the Ministry of Finance.

title: Resources Alam Indonesia’s net profit grew 9.2% in the first half
body: PT Resources Alam Indonesia Tbk (KKGI) booked net profit of USD 23.3 million in the first half (H1) of 2024, up 9.2% year-on-year (yoy) from the same period last year.

title: RSCH secures IDR 40 billion loan for renovation
body: PT Charlie Hospital Semarang Tbk (RSCH) obtained a credit facility worth a total of IDR 40 billion from PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) last week (29/7).

title: Mulia Industrindo net profit slumps 47.7% in first semester
body: PT Mulia Industrindo Tbk (MLIA), a glass manufacturer for buildings and vehicles, posted a net profit of IDR 173.63 billion in the first semester (1H) 2024.

title: 200 million Voksel Electric (VOKS) shares sold by Hengtong Optic
body: On Friday, August 2, as many as 200 million shares of PT Voksel Electric Tbk (VOKS), a company that makes telecommunications cables, were sold by foreign investor Hengtong Optic Electric. With this most recent sale, the investor's share holdings in VOKS were down to 54.76% from almost sixty percent.

title: Foreign shares sale transactions reach 3 billion shares, net foreign volume falls to -517.14 million
body: On Monday, August 5, foreign selling volume hit 3.03 billion shares, while foreign buying volume was only 2.51 billion shares. The gap between the two caused the net foreign volume to drop at -517.14 million shares. Foreign investors began buying 788.36 million shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), resulting in a net volume of 92.24 million shares.

title: 30 million Rukun Raharja (RAJA) shares acquired; Sentosa Bersama currently owns 34%
body: PT Rukun Raharja Tbk (RAJA), an integrated gas energy provider, was the target of PT Sentosa Bersama Mitra's acquisition of 30 million shares in early August. The investor's control was also bolstered by this share purchase on Thursday, August 1, which increased from 33.98% to 34.69%.

title: RAAM plans to issue 19.42 million shares via private placement
body: PT Tripar Multivision Plus Tbk (RAAM), also known as Multivision Plus production house, is planning the issuance of 619.42 million shares worth IDR 60 each via private placement.

title: Operational expenses worsened, Era Graharealty saw IDR 1.18 billion loss
body: PT Era Graharelaty Tbk (IPAC), a real estate management and developer, booked a net loss of IDR 1.18 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: BPS: Economic growth reached 5.08% in H1 2024
body: Statistics Indonesia (BPS) reported cumulative-to-cumulative economic growth in H1 2024 of 5.08% from the same period in 2023.

title: BSI Mobile as Leading Agent for Increasing Digital Penetration and Integrated Financial Services
body: PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BRIS) or BSI continues to innovate and develop to strengthen BSI Mobile as a platform that can answer every customer's needs.

title: Morning session saw JCI at steady position
body: Jakarta Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) at the beginning of today’s (6/8) afternoon session seemingly grew steadily, although yet to bounce back to 7,250 or higher, a minimum level of the index observed within the past week.

title: Foreign investors buy big sum of Gojek Tokopedia shares, net foreign volume recorded surplus at 174.73 million
body: In contrast to the previous day, shares of digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) were the most purchased on Friday, August 2, with foreign investors purchasing almost 750 million shares for a net volume of 153.57 million shares. The foreign buying volume was 2.19 billion shares, while the foreign selling volume was 2.02 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume shifted into the green zone, closing at 174.73 million shares.

title: Silvery Moon Investment now owns 10% of VKTR Teknologi (VKTR) shares
body: Silvery Moon Investment decided to purchase shares in PT VKTR Teknologi Mobilitas Tbk (VKTR) at the end of July. Through PT Ciptadana Sekuritas Asia, this foreign investor purchased 4.65 billion shares on Wednesday, July 31, giving them approximately 10.63% ownership of the electric vehicle company. Concurrently, PT Bakrie & Brothers Tbk, another large shareholder of VKTR, actually sold off 4.65 billion shares, resulting in a drop in ownership from 41.04% to 30.41%.

title: Nippon Indosari Corpindo greenlit for buyback of IDR 149.6 billion
body: PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk (ROTI), a mass baked goods’ manufacturer known with its brands, Sari Roti and Sari Kue, has secured approval from its shareholders to conduct a shares buyback.

title: Free float issue still common in companies listed under IDX monitoring board
body: Throughout July 2024, 21 issuers were reported being listed under the special monitoring board of Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) authorities. Out of those 21, 15 were reported failing to meet the free float requirement.

title: One-year debuting, yet RAFI’s stock plummeted 80.64%
body: The stock PT Sari Kreasi Boga Tbk (RAFI), a kebab outlet managing company, crashed 80.64% year-on-year (yoy) after one year debuting in the stock exchange last year on August 5, 2023.

title: BFIN reported profit slippage of 19.16% in H1 2024
body: PT BFI Finance Indonesia Tbk (BFIN) saw correction in its performance in H1 2024 compared to the same period in 2023. This revenue decline was triggered by low revenue from financing receivables.

title: Reaching profitability, Alfa Energi bagged IDR 18.45 billion in H1 2024
body: PT Alfa Energi Tbk (FIRE), a coal mining company, booked net profit of IDR 18.4 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: BISI’s profit skyrocketed 88% in H1 2024
body: The profit of PT BISI Internasional Tbk (BISI) soared 88.25% year-on-year (yoy) in H1 2024 although its revenue sloped 4.62% yoy from the same period last year.

title: IPO last year, Dewi Shri Farmindo saw 32.6% drop in profit
body: PT Dewi Shri Farmindo Tbk (DEWI), a broiler chicken farm company debuting on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) in 2023, only reported net profit of IDR 1.57 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Turning loss around, NETV bags IDR 49.99 billion in the first half
body: PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV), a holding companya managing television broadcast and creative content production, booked net profit of IDR 49.99 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Opening the week, JCI was sluggish throughout the day
body: Jakarta Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) kept declining since today’s (5/8) transaction opening until the closing bell this afternoon.

title: Just debuted, Xolare RCR Energy lost IDR 4.19 billion
body: PT Xolare RCR Energy Tbk (SOLA), a company engaged in asphalt manufacturing and trading, booked a loss of IDR 4.19 billion in the first half of 2024.

title: A year debuting, CNMA stock crashes 18.42%
body: The stock performance of PT Nusantara Sejahtera Raya Tbk (CNMA) reportedly plummeted 18.42% on August 5, 2024, recorded after a year debuting on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Dana Brata Luhur will distribute cash dividend of IDR 19.27 billion
body: PT Dana Brata Luhur Tbk (TEBE), a holding company investing in several infrastructure projects, will distribute interim dividend of IDR 15 per share or IDR 19.27 billion in total.

title: Global Sukses Digital sets IPO price to IDR 135 per share
body: PT Global Sukses Digital Tbk (DOSS), a retail company and an online marketplace specialised in photography tools, has set the offering price for the shares offered in Initial Public Offering (IPO) to IDR 135 each.

title: July 2024 saw IDX market cap grew 2.02% mtm to IDR 12.33 quadrillion
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) reported market capitalisation growth of 2.02% month-to-month (mtm) to IDR 12.33 quadrillion at the end of July 2024 from IDR 12.09 quadrillion seen on June 30, 2024.

title: SAMF’s net profit dropped 13% in H1 2024
body: PT Saraswanti Anugerah Makmur Tbk (SAMF), an NPK fertiliser manufacturer and distributor, booked net profit of IDR 216 billion in the first half of 2024, down 13% year-on-year (yoy) from the same period last year.

title: Composite Stock Price Index saw decline Monday morning
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) was seen lounging around in the red zone since the opening bell this morning (5/8) until 11 AM WIB. The index was opened at 7,230.39, down from 7,308.12 seen last Friday (2/8).

title: SMDR’s profit down 56.50% in H1 2024
body: The performance of PT Samudra Indonesia Tbk (SMDR), an operator of logistics and shipping services, reportedly slowed down in the first half of 2024 due to decline in freight income.

title: First half of 2024 saw PYFA’s loss worsening 155.79%
body: The net loss of PT Pyridam Farma Tbk (PYFA) worsened 155.79% year-on-year (yoy) in the first half of 2024 compared to the same period in 2023 although sales growth reached 29.87% yoy.

title: Hery Gunardi: Banking needs higher agility to face future economic challenges and opportunities
body: The national banking industry, as one of the main sectors supporting the country's economy, is said to need to be more agile in facing economic challenges and opportunities in the future, so that Indonesia's economic condition is better maintained.

title: August sees largest bond payment from Bank Rakyat Indonesia, reaching IDR2.5 T
body: Shelf Registration Bond IV Mandala Multifinance Tahap III Tahun 2021 Seri B from PT Mandala Multifinance Tbk (MFIN) will be the first bond on the list of bonds maturing in August. On August 6, this consumer finance company is expected to pay IDR 150 billion toward a bond debt. The Shelf Registration Bond V BFI Finance Indonesia Tahap II Tahun 2021 Seri C will also be paid off at IDR 530 billion on the same day from PT BFI Finance Indonesia Tbk (BFIN), another financing company.

title: 890 million Gojek Tokopedia shares sold; net foreign volume closed at -572.06 million shares
body: On Thursday, August 1, foreign investors sold 890.86 million shares of PT Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), resulting in a net volume of -645.77 million shares. This share sales accounted for approximately 37% of the overall foreign sales volume, totaling 2.39 billion shares. Foreign buying volume was 1.82 billion shares, with net foreign volume closing at -572.06 million shares.

title: Fitradityo Harjuno acquired 161 million Nusatama (NTBK) shares, giving him nearly 6% stake
body: Fitradityo Harjuno, an individual investor, purchased 161.53 million shares of PT Nusatama Berkah Tbk (NTBK), the company that manufactures and fabricates special vehicles, on Tuesday, July 30. Through PT Sucor Sekuritas, he completed the transaction, controlling 5.98% of the shares, or nearly 6% of the total. Ikra Zama Dinnata, another NTBK investor, on the other hand, actually released 64 million shares, reducing the share percentage from 9.56% to 7.19%.

title: Wulandari Bangun Sarana to distribute interim dividend of IDR 25.09 billion
body: PT Wulandari Bangun Laksana Tbk (BSBK), a property and real estate developer, is scheduling interim dividend distribution of IDR 25.09 billion or IDR 1 per share.

title: Inflation sloped in July 2024
body: Statistics Indonesia (BPS) reported inflation arriving at 2.13% in July 2024, sliding down from July 2023’s position at 3.08%.

title: Esta Indonesia to set IPO price high at IDR 200 per share
body: PT Esta Indonesia Tbk (NEST), a swallow’s nest manufacturer and wholesale company, has set the initial public offering (IPO) price to IDR 200 per share.

title: Recording 6% revenue growth, HOKI turned the tides to profitability
body: Revenue of PT Buyung Poetra Sembada Tbk (HOKI), a rice manufacturer known with its brand, Topi Koki, reportedly increased slightly by 6% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 744 billion at the end of the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Revenue slowed down, Sari Kreasi Boga’s net profit plummeted 90%
body: PT Sari Kreasi Boga Tbk (RAFI), the managing company of Kebab Turki Baba Rafi franchise, only managed to bag net profit of IDR 9.08 billion in the first half of 2024.

title: Adira Finance saw profit shrinkage due to swelling expenses
body: The revenue of PT Adira Dinamika Multifinance Tbk (ADMF) reportedly increased 10.68% year-on-year (yoy) in H1 2024, while its profit sloped 6.58% yoy due to a 16.32% yoy increase in total expenses.

title: Approved, Bank Commonwealth officially merges into Bank OCBC NISP
body: After the green light from shareholders, PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk (OCBC) now officially merges PT Bank Commonwealth (PTBC) with the company.

title: CLEO’s profit soared 71% in H1 2024
body: PT Sariguna Primatirta Tbk (CLEO), a bottled mineral water manufacturer known with its brand, Cleo, reported net profit of IDR 220.22 billion in the first half of 2024.

title: Indofarma still on loss streak until H1 2024
body: PT Indofarma Tbk (INAF), a state-owned pharmaceutical company owned through PT Bio Farma (Persero), booked a loss of IDR 101.94 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Revenue doubled, SUNI met its 2024 profit target early
body: PT Sunindo Pratama Tbk (SUNI), an oil country tubular goods (OCTG) manufacturer, booked revenue of IDR 522.4 billion in the first half of 2024, nearly double the revenue seen in H1 2023 of IDR 263.2 billion, or increasing 98.6% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Bumi Serpong Damai to gain control over SMDM
body: PT Bumi Serpong Damai Tbk (BSDE) reportedly will claim the controlling shareholder position in PT Suryamas Dutamakmur Tbk (SMDM), another real estate management and developer.

title: ACES scored 21% profit growth to IDR 365.76 billion
body: PT Aspirasi Hidup Indonesia Tbk (ACES), a new constituent of Indeks Tempo-IDNFinancials 52, booked net profit of IDR 365.76 billion in the first half of 2024, up 21% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 302.43 billion seen in H1 2023.
